
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Name
! Reactants
! Result
|-
! Water Potassium Explosion
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|water}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/explosion_potassium/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Water Potassium Explosion
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|holywater}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/explosion_potassium/holy/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Honk Potassium Explosion
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|honkserum}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/fake_explosion_potassium/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Honkoglycerin Explosion
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|honkserum}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|/list}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/fake_explosion_potassium/bigger/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Soap
|<ul><li>{{reagent|20|potassium_hydroxide}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|nutriment}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/soap/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Creatine
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|nutriment}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|creatine}}
|-
! Discount Dan's Special Sauce
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|irradiatedbeans}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|toxicwaste}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|refriedbeans}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|mutatedbeans}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|beff}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|horsemeat}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cornsyrup}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|moonrocks}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|offcolorcheese}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|bonemarrow}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|greenramen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|glowingramen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|deepfriedramen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|13|discount}}
|-
! Peptobismol
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|discount}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|peptobismol}}
|-
! EMP Pulse
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|uranium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|iron}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/emp_pulse/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Silica
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|silicon}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|silica}}
|-
! Silicate
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|aluminum}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|silica}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|silicon}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|18|silicate}}
|-
! Phalanximine
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|hyronalin}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|mutagen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|phalanximine}}
|-
! Sleep Toxin
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|chloralhydrate}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|/list}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|stoxin}}
|-
! Sterilizine
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|chlorine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|sterilizine}}

|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|oxygen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|carbon}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|inaprovaline}}

! Dylovene
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|silicon}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|nitrogen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|anti_toxin}}
|-
! Unstable mutagen
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|radium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|phosphorus}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|chlorine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|mutagen}}
|-
! Tramadol
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|inaprovaline}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|tramadol}}
|-
! Oxycodone
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tramadol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|plasma}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|oxycodone}}
|-
! Water
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|hydrogen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|water}}
|-
! Sulphuric Acid
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|sulfur}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|oxygen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|water}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|sacid}}
|-
! Thermite
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aluminum}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|iron}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|thermite}}
|-
! Lexorin
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|plasma}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ammonia}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|lexorin}}
|-
! Space Drugs
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|mercury}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|lithium}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|space_drugs}}
|-
! Space Lube
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|water}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|silica}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|silicon}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|8|lube}}
|-
! Sodium Polyacrylate
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|carbon}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|sodium}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|water}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|8|sodium_polyacrylate}}
|-
! Absorb Water
|<ul><li>{{reagent|0.3|sodium_polyacrylate}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|water}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|0.3|chemical_waste}}
|-
! Absorb Lube
|<ul><li>{{reagent|0.3|sodium_polyacrylate}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|lube}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|0.3|chemical_waste}}
|-
! Sludge
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|lube}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|0.2|chemical_waste}}
|-
! Degrease
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|chemical_waste}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/degrease/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Polytrinic acid
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|chlorine}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li></ul>

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/metalfoam/on_reaction()!)''

! Iron Foam
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|iron}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|foaming_agent}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/ironfoam/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Foaming Agent
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|lithium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|hydrogen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|foaming_agent}}
|-
! Ammonia
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|hydrogen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|nitrogen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|ammonia}}
|-
! Ammonium Nitrate
|<ul><li>{{reagent|5|ammonia}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|cleaner}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|nitrogen}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|18|ammoniumnitrate}}
|-
! Diethylamine
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ammonia}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ethanol}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|diethylamine}}
|-
! Space Cleaner
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ammonia}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|water}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|cleaner}}
|-
! Bleach
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|sodiumchloride}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|cleaner}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|bleach}}
|-
! Acetone
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|carbon}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|water}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|hydrogen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|acetone}}
|-
! Luminol
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|cleaner}}</li><li>{{reagent|8|carbon}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|10|luminol}}
|-
! E-Z-Nutrient
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|nitrogen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|phosphorus}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|potassium}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|eznutrient}}
|-
! Robust Harvest
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|eznutrient}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|formic_acid}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|robustharvest}}

|{{reagent|1|left4zed}}

|{{reagent|5|plantbgone}}
|-
! Insecticide
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|saltwater}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|insecticide}}

|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|dexalin}}

|{{reagent|2|leporazine}}

|{{reagent|2|clonexadone}}
|-
! Shapeshift
|<ul><li>{{reagent|5|blood}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/mimicshift/on_reaction()!)''

!

|-
! The Doctor's Delight
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|limejuice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tomatojuice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|orangejuice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cream}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tricordrazine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|doctorsdelight}}
|-
! The Dector's Delight from pre-mix
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|dsyrup}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tricordrazine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|doctorsdelight}}
|-
! Irish Cream
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|whiskey}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cream}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|irishcream}}
|-
! The Manly Dorf
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|beer}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|ale}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|manlydorf}}

! Hooch
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|ethanol}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|fuel}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|hooch}}

! Irish Coffee
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|irishcream}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|coffee}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|irishcoffee}}

! Smoky Room

|{{reagent|4|smokyroom}}
|-
! Rags to Riches
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|vodka}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cognac}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|ragstoriches}}
|-
! Bad Touch
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|rum}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|kahlua}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|ice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|bad_touch}}
|-
! Electric Sheep
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|wine}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|silicon}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|electric_sheep}}
|-
! Suicide
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|spacemountainwind}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|dr_gibb}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cola}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|lemon_lime}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|suicide}}
|-
! Scientist's Serendipity
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|moonrocks}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|scientists_serendipity}}
|-
! Metabuddy
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|tonic}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|metabuddy}}
|-
! Waifu
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|sake}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|waifu}}
|-
! Husbando
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|manlydorf}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|husbando}}
|-
! Tomboy
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|husbando}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|waifu}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|tomboy}}
|-
! Beepsky Classic
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|beepskysmash}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|beepsky_classic}}
|-
! Spiders
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|clonexadone}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|spiders}}
|-
! Weed Eater
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|amatoxin}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|psilocybin}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|weed_eater}}
|-
! Gravitational Singulo
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|singulo}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|gravitationalsingulo}}
|-
! Gravitational Singularitea
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|singularitea}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|karmotrine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|gravitationalsingularitea}}
|-
! Lemon Lime
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|limejuice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|lemonjuice}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|sodawater}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|lemon_lime}}
|-
! monstermash
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ectoplasm}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|caramel}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tomatojuice}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|monstermash}}
|-
! Eggnog
|<ul><li>{{reagent|2|milk}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|cream}}</li><li>{{reagent|0.4|egg_yolk}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|eggnog}}
|-
! Festive Eggnog
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|eggnog}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|rum}}</li><li>{{reagent|0.1|cinnamon}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|festive_eggnog}}
|-
! Dr. Pecker's DIY Soda
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|lemon_lime}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|sodawater}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|inacusiate}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|diy_soda}}
|-
! Colorful Reagent
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|mescaline}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|psilocybin}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|amatoxin}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|colorful_reagent}}
|-
! Black Food Coloring
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|colorful_reagent}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|carbon}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|blackcolor}}
|-
! Degenerate Calcium
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|milk}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|mutagen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|degeneratecalcium}}
|-
! Ironrot
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|amanitin}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|radium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|iron}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|ironrot}}
|-
! Aminomicin
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|clonexadone}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|mutagen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|enzyme}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}
|-
! Synthparrot
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|nutriment}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthparrot/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! 
|<ul></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmob/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Synthmouse
|<ul><li>{{reagent|3|nutriment}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmob/synthmouse/on_reaction()!)''

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmob/synthcorgi/on_reaction()!)''

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmob/synthroach/on_reaction()!)''

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmob/synthclown/on_reaction()!)''

|-
! 
|<ul></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmobhostile/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Synthcarp

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmobhostile/synthcarp/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Synthmutroach
|<ul><li>{{reagent|10|mutagen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|aminoblatella}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmobhostile/synthmutroach/on_reaction()!)''

! Synthcluwneguette

|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthmobhostile/synthcluwneguette/on_reaction()!)''

! Aminomician
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li><li>{{reagent|3|bonemarrow}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|aminomician}}
|-
! Aminocyprinidol
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|carppheromones}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|aminocyprinidol}}
|-
! Aminoblatella
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|roach_shell}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|aminoblatella}}
|-
! Aminocorydon
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aminomicin}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|banana}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|aminocorydon}}
|-
! Ectoplasm
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|aminomician}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|frostoil}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|ectoplasm}}
|-
! Synthskeleton
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ectoplasm}}</li><li>{{reagent|10|degeneratecalcium}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthskeleton/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Synthgingerbone
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ectoplasm}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|caramel}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/synthgingerbone/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Midazoline
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|clonexadone}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|gold}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|midazoline}}
|-
! Midazoline-to-Mercury
|<ul><li>{{reagent|0.1|midazoline}}</li><li>{{reagent|0.1|mercury}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|0.2|mercury}}
|-
! Locutogen
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|piccolyn}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|inacusiate}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|locutogen}}
|-
! Bumcivilian
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|/list}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|1|bumcivilian}}
|-
! Random chemical
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|nothing}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|phazon}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|mutagen}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|enzyme}}</li></ul>
|''(Check /datum/chemical_reaction/random/on_reaction()!)''
|-
! Dan's Purple Drank
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|mutagen}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|plasma}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|discount}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|3|fake_creep}}
|-
! Punctualite
|<ul><li>{{reagent|10|hyperzine}}</li><li>{{reagent|10|fuel}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|zombiepowder}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|5|punctualite}}
|-
! Vomit
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|nutriment}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|sacid}}</li><li>{{reagent|5|enzyme}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|vomit}}
|-
! Squash
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|manlydorf}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|degeneratecalcium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|hyperzine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|squash}}
|-
! Priaxate
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|gravy}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tricordrazine}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|priaxate}}
|-
! Lithium Sodium Tungstate
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|lithium}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|sodium}}</li><li>{{reagent|1|tungsten}}</li><li>{{reagent|4|oxygen}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|8|lithiumsodiumtungstate}}
|-
! Analysis sample
|<ul><li>{{reagent|1|ground_rock}}</li><li>{{reagent|2|lithiumsodiumtungstate}}</li></ul>
|{{reagent|2|analysis_sample}}
|}
